name: cross-agent-reviews
description: 3-round cross-agent spec/plan review pipeline. Reviewer audits findings and author settles them across fresh sessions, with a strict final round.

interface.longDescription: Six-step pipeline for reviewing specs and implementation plans across multiple sessions. Reviewer rounds (1a/2a/3a — audit) dispatch 5 parallel sub-agents per slice with model-tier guidance. Author rounds (1b/2b/3b — settle) accept or reject findings and edit the artifact. Round 3 is a strict final pass. Terminates with status READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION or CORRECTED_AND_READY.
defaultPrompt: Run cr-1a-audit on the spec at <path>
Run cr-1b-settle with the round 1a JSON
Run cr-3b-final-settle with the round 3a JSON
